conversation.content: speckit.constitution Create principles focused on code quality, testing standards, user experience consistency, and performance requirements
Updated the constitution with principles centered on code quality, testing standards, UX consistency, and performance requirements; asked for ratification date and offered adjustments.
speckit.specify "Create a specification based on the requirements in scenarios_promotions.md"
Created spec and checklist for promotions/discounts feature; noted no Git repo for branch.
speckit.plan
Generated plan, research, data model, contracts, quickstart, and updated AGENTS.md.
speckit.tasks
Generated tasks.md with backend+frontend split.
speckit.plan add for front-end
Updated plan to include frontend and web app structure.
I’ll regenerate tasks.md
Regenerated tasks.md including frontend work.
speckit.implement
Implemented all tasks across backend/frontend, added tests and configs, and updated docs.
run tests
Ran backend pytest: 12 passed with datetime.utcnow warnings; frontend tests not run due to missing tooling.
crate docker to start for backend, frontend, db
Created docker-compose.yml and Dockerfiles for backend, frontend, and Postgres.
docker compose up --build
Brought up containers; backend and frontend running.
for frontend, it did not show UI
Explained frontend served static placeholder; asked for stack.
use Vite
Added Vite setup, updated frontend Dockerfile to build and serve UI.
docker compose up --build
Rebuilt and started containers; Vite build succeeded and frontend served on :3000.
